requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — GSO CISPR 15 (Radio Disturbance of Lighting Equipment)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——GSO CISPR 15（照明设备无线电骚扰）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——GSO CISPR 15（照明設備無線電騷擾）

summary.en: LED luminaires entering Kuwait are expected to control radio-frequency disturbance in line with the GSO adoption of CISPR 15 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), applied within the KUCAS conformity framework administered by PAI. It covers conducted emissions on the mains terminals (150 kHz–30 MHz) and radiated emissions. Where EMC is a checked requirement for the product category, the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report should include CISPR 15-based emission evidence. Smart luminaires with wireless functions additionally fall under CITRA radio approval (see ledkw-emc-02). Products are evaluated for the 240 V, 50 Hz Kuwait supply.
summary.zh: 进入科威特的 LED 灯具应按 GSO 采用的 CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）控制射频骚扰，并在由 PAI 管理的 KUCAS 合格评定框架内适用。其涵盖电源端传导发射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及辐射发射。当 EMC 为该产品类别的核查要求时，KUCAS 技术评估报告应包含基于 CISPR 15 的发射证据。集成无线功能的智能灯具还须取得 CITRA 无线电核准（见 ledkw-emc-02）。产品按科威特 240 V、50 Hz 电源评估。
summary.zht: 進入科威特的 LED 燈具應按 GSO 採用的 CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）控制射頻騷擾，並在由 PAI 管理的 KUCAS 合格評定框架內適用。其涵蓋電源端傳導發射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及輻射發射。當 EMC 為該產品類別的核查要求時，KUCAS 技術評估報告應包含基於 CISPR 15 的發射證據。集成無線功能的智能燈具還須取得 CITRA 無線電核准（見 ledkw-emc-02）。產品按科威特 240 V、50 Hz 電源評估。

standards_or_laws: GSO CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (GSO adoption of CISPR 15)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance forms part of CCC certification for relevant product categories and is tested at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories at China's 220 V, 50 Hz. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not by themselves accepted under the KUCAS conformity pathway.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具，GB 17743 合规是相关产品类别 CCC 认证的组成部分，并在中国 220 V、50 Hz 下由 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室检测。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告本身不被 KUCAS 合格评定路径所接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具，GB 17743 合規是相關產品類別 CCC 認證的組成部分，並在中國 220 V、50 Hz 下由 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室檢測。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告本身不被 KUCAS 合格評定路徑所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Both GSO CISPR 15 and GB 17743 derive from CISPR 15, so emission limits are largely harmonized and a product passing GB 17743 will generally meet the same technical limits. The gaps are procedural: (1) emission evidence must be presented within the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report through a PAI-recognised conformity body — CCC EMC reports cannot be reused directly; (2) the evaluation references the Kuwait 240 V, 50 Hz supply rather than China's 220 V (50 Hz matches); (3) confirm with PAI whether EMC is a checked element for the specific luminaire category, since KUCAS evidence requirements vary by product; (4) any wireless/smart function shifts the product additionally into CITRA radio approval scope. Manufacturers should retain CISPR 15-based emission reports from a lab whose results are accepted by PAI.
gap.zh: GSO CISPR 15 与 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值基本协调，通过 GB 17743 的产品通常满足相同技术限值。差距在于程序：（1）发射证据须通过 PAI 认可的合格评定机构纳入 KUCAS 技术评估报告——CCC EMC 报告不可直接复用；（2）评估参照科威特 240 V、50 Hz 电源而非中国 220 V（50 Hz 一致）；（3）须向 PAI 确认 EMC 是否为该具体灯具类别的核查项，因 KUCAS 证据要求随产品而异；（4）任何无线/智能功能会使产品额外进入 CITRA 无线电核准范围。制造商应保留来自其结果为 PAI 所接受的实验室出具的基于 CISPR 15 的发射报告。
gap.zht: GSO CISPR 15 與 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值基本協調，通過 GB 17743 的產品通常滿足相同技術限值。差距在於程序：（1）發射證據須通過 PAI 認可的合格評定機構納入 KUCAS 技術評估報告——CCC EMC 報告不可直接複用；（2）評估參照科威特 240 V、50 Hz 電源而非中國 220 V（50 Hz 一致）；（3）須向 PAI 確認 EMC 是否為該具體燈具類別的核查項，因 KUCAS 證據要求隨產品而異；（4）任何無線/智能功能會使產品額外進入 CITRA 無線電核准範圍。製造商應保留來自其結果為 PAI 所接受的實驗室出具的基於 CISPR 15 的發射報告。

mandatory_status.target: Applicable within KUCAS — GSO CISPR 15-based emission control expected for in-scope lighting equipment; evidence presented via the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report (confirm category scope with PAI)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for relevant luminaire categories sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires entering Kuwait are expected to control radio disturbance per the GSO adoption of CISPR 15, with emission evidence presented inside the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report through a PAI-recognised body. Limits are broadly harmonized with China's GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), but CCC EMC reports do not by themselves satisfy KUCAS and the evaluation references the 240 V, 50 Hz Kuwait supply. Smart luminaires with wireless functions additionally require CITRA approval. Confirm with PAI whether EMC is a checked element for the specific product category.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入科威特的 LED 灯具应按 GSO 采用的 CISPR 15 控制无线电骚扰，发射证据须通过 PAI 认可机构纳入 KUCAS 技术评估报告。限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，但 CCC EMC 报告本身不满足 KUCAS，且评估参照科威特 240 V、50 Hz 电源。集成无线功能的智能灯具还须取得 CITRA 核准。请向 PAI 确认 EMC 是否为该具体产品类别的核查项。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入科威特的 LED 燈具應按 GSO 採用的 CISPR 15 控制無線電騷擾，發射證據須通過 PAI 認可機構納入 KUCAS 技術評估報告。限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，但 CCC EMC 報告本身不滿足 KUCAS，且評估參照科威特 240 V、50 Hz 電源。集成無線功能的智能燈具還須取得 CITRA 核准。請向 PAI 確認 EMC 是否為該具體產品類別的核查項。

requirement_topic.en: Wireless / Smart Luminaire Radio Type Approval (CITRA + GSO RF)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线/智能灯具无线电型号核准（CITRA + GSO 射频）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線/智能燈具無線電型號核准（CITRA + GSO 射頻）

summary.en: LED luminaires with integrated wireless functionality (e.g. Wi-Fi or Bluetooth smart lighting, RF remote dimming) require radio type approval from CITRA (Communication and Information Technology Regulatory Authority) before being placed on the Kuwait market, in addition to KUCAS safety/EMC clearance through PAI. CITRA approval covers permitted frequency bands, transmit power, and radio-equipment conformity for short-range devices, generally referencing the GSO/GCC RF framework. The radio module must operate within Kuwait's authorised bands; the importer typically files the CITRA application. Mains-powered luminaires are also evaluated for the 240 V, 50 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 集成无线功能的 LED 灯具（如 Wi-Fi 或蓝牙智能照明、射频遥控调光）在投放科威特市场前，除经 PAI 办理 KUCAS 安全/EMC 放行外，还须取得 CITRA（通信与信息技术监管局）无线电型号核准。CITRA 核准涵盖允许的频段、发射功率及短距离设备的无线电设备符合性，通常参照 GSO/GCC 射频框架。无线电模块须在科威特授权频段内运行；通常由进口商提交 CITRA 申请。市电供电灯具亦按 240 V、50 Hz 电源评估。
summary.zht: 集成無線功能的 LED 燈具（如 Wi-Fi 或藍牙智能照明、射頻遙控調光）在投放科威特市場前，除經 PAI 辦理 KUCAS 安全/EMC 放行外，還須取得 CITRA（通信與信息技術監管局）無線電型號核准。CITRA 核准涵蓋允許的頻段、發射功率及短距離設備的無線電設備符合性，通常參照 GSO/GCC 射頻框架。無線電模組須在科威特授權頻段內運行；通常由進口商提交 CITRA 申請。市電供電燈具亦按 240 V、50 Hz 電源評估。

standards_or_laws: CITRA — Communication and Information Technology Regulatory Authority, Kuwait (radio / short-range-device type approval)
GSO / GCC RF framework for short-range and radio equipment (as referenced by CITRA)

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval for the radio module, in addition to CCC for safety/EMC where applicable. SRRC approval governs permitted frequency bands and transmit power for products using radio in China. SRRC type approval is China-specific and is not recognised by CITRA; a separate Kuwait radio approval is required.
summary.zh: 在中国，集成无线功能的灯具除适用情况下的安全/EMC CCC 外，其无线电模块须取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准。SRRC 核准管辖在中国使用无线电的产品的允许频段及发射功率。SRRC 型号核准为中国特有，不被 CITRA 所承认；须另行取得科威特无线电核准。
summary.zht: 在中國，集成無線功能的燈具除適用情況下的安全/EMC CCC 外，其無線電模組須取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准。SRRC 核准管轄在中國使用無線電的產品的允許頻段及發射功率。SRRC 型號核准為中國特有，不被 CITRA 所承認；須另行取得科威特無線電核准。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled products in China (State Radio Regulation Commission)

gap.en: China's SRRC radio type approval has no mutual recognition with Kuwait's CITRA — a smart luminaire approved for radio use in China must obtain separate CITRA approval for Kuwait. Key points: (1) the radio module must operate within Kuwait's authorised frequency bands and power limits, which can differ from China's SRRC allocations; (2) CITRA approval is a distinct step on top of KUCAS safety/EMC clearance via PAI — both are required for a smart luminaire; (3) the application is generally filed by the registered Kuwaiti importer/agent; (4) module-level documentation (test reports against the applicable RF standards) is typically needed. Manufacturers shipping Wi-Fi/Bluetooth or RF-controlled luminaires to Kuwait should plan for the CITRA process in parallel with KUCAS, since SRRC paperwork from China cannot be reused.
gap.zh: 中国 SRRC 无线电型号核准与科威特 CITRA 之间无互认——在中国获准用于无线电的智能灯具须另行取得科威特 CITRA 核准。要点：（1）无线电模块须在科威特授权频段及功率限值内运行，可能与中国 SRRC 分配不同；（2）CITRA 核准是在经 PAI 的 KUCAS 安全/EMC 放行之上的独立步骤——智能灯具二者均须；（3）申请通常由注册的科威特进口商/代理提交；（4）通常需要模块级文件（针对适用射频标准的检测报告）。向科威特发运 Wi-Fi/蓝牙或射频遥控灯具的制造商应在 KUCAS 之外并行规划 CITRA 流程，因中国 SRRC 文件不可复用。
gap.zht: 中國 SRRC 無線電型號核准與科威特 CITRA 之間無互認——在中國獲准用於無線電的智能燈具須另行取得科威特 CITRA 核准。要點：（1）無線電模組須在科威特授權頻段及功率限值內運行，可能與中國 SRRC 分配不同；（2）CITRA 核准是在經 PAI 的 KUCAS 安全/EMC 放行之上的獨立步驟——智能燈具二者均須；（3）申請通常由註冊的科威特進口商/代理提交；（4）通常需要模組級文件（針對適用射頻標準的檢測報告）。向科威特發運 Wi-Fi/藍牙或射頻遙控燈具的製造商應在 KUCAS 之外並行規劃 CITRA 流程，因中國 SRRC 文件不可複用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless luminaires — CITRA radio type approval required before Kuwait market placement, in addition to KUCAS safety/EMC clearance via PAI
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless products — SRRC type approval required in China; not recognised by CITRA

source.publisher: CITRA — Communication and Information Technology Regulatory Authority, Kuwait

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart/wireless LED luminaires entering Kuwait require CITRA radio type approval in addition to KUCAS safety and EMC clearance through PAI. CITRA governs permitted bands and transmit power and is independent of China's SRRC approval, which is not recognised — a separate Kuwait radio approval is required and is typically filed by the registered importer. Plan the CITRA process in parallel with KUCAS for any luminaire with Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or RF control. Confirm current band and power limits with CITRA before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入科威特的智能/无线 LED 灯具除经 PAI 的 KUCAS 安全及 EMC 放行外，还须取得 CITRA 无线电型号核准。CITRA 管辖允许频段及发射功率，独立于中国 SRRC 核准，且不承认 SRRC——须另行取得科威特无线电核准，通常由注册进口商提交。对于任何带 Wi-Fi、蓝牙或射频遥控的灯具，应与 KUCAS 并行规划 CITRA 流程。出货前请向 CITRA 确认现行频段及功率限值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入科威特的智能/無線 LED 燈具除經 PAI 的 KUCAS 安全及 EMC 放行外，還須取得 CITRA 無線電型號核准。CITRA 管轄允許頻段及發射功率，獨立於中國 SRRC 核准，且不承認 SRRC——須另行取得科威特無線電核准，通常由註冊進口商提交。對於任何帶 Wi-Fi、藍牙或射頻遙控的燈具，應與 KUCAS 並行規劃 CITRA 流程。出貨前請向 CITRA 確認現行頻段及功率限值。
